description: next/ v4 — PHASE-0 ARCHITECTURE FIX: REAL ERP ProductionOrder (Level-3 OperationsRequest = PLAN/SOLL) via the sim-v5 ERP REST API (http://192.168.178.154:38260/api/orders), replacing the postgresql/erp-production-orders.json direct-erpdb poller (the forbidden direct-DB bypass). Same sourceId (edge SOURCE_IDS unchanged), same profile contract (SMProfile-ProductionOrder). BUG FIX: the old postgres source pointed at table erpdb.llm_test_v3.machineid_nodeid (a node-mapping table, not the FA backlog) — this REST source reads the real production-order shape (/api/orders, the same combined order row the Sim cramms Plan+Ist onto; this projection maps ONLY the PLAN fields + join key). production_order_no = identity/join key; article_no -> article_ref, machine_no -> machine_ref, geplante_stueckzahl -> qty_planned (SOLL), lieferdatum_soll -> planned_end_time, material_verfuegbar_ab -> material_ready_at. BONUS over the old source: cycle_time_planned_sec is a real REST key -> mapped (the old machineid_nodeid table had no cycle column). Customer demand denormalised on the order row: geplante_stueckzahl -> customer_order_qty + lieferdatum -> customer_due_date (the REST shape carries no separate kunde_bestellmenge/kunde_lieferdatum columns; on this combined projection the order qty IS the customer qty and lieferdatum IS the customer due-date — same semantic the postgres source served, without an impossible reverse-join). status arrives canonical/lowercase from the REST API (offen/freigegeben/in_arbeit/fertig/abgeschlossen) -> mapped directly with NO valueMap (the postgres source had to normalise the coded integer order_status 1..5; the REST projection emits the readable tokens natively). full_refresh change-detection (the REST API does not honour ?since — verified) — it-edge dedups via the per-id HWM on production_order_no. filter=null (full backlog per the cutover decision). Maps ONLY the PLAN fields + join key — the IST (produzierte_stueckzahl) is the dedicated OperationsResponse entity (erp-operations-response). Plan-vs-Ist (qty_shortfall) is the it-evaluator cross-source reconcile against OperationsResponse on production_order_no — this profile carries no constraints block.
